issues_fixed.issue: ISSUE 1: Duplicate Telegram notifications on error retry
issues_fixed.root_cause: send_telegram() called in exception handler without deduplication — sent on every retry loop

fix.change: Added error_notified flag before try block
Added conditional check in exception handler
fix.old_code:
except Exception as e:
    log(f"
❌ FAILED: {str(e)}")
    update_task(task_id, 'failed', {'error': str(e)})
    send_telegram(f"❌ Competitive Intelligence Failed

{client_name}
{str(e)}")
fix.effect: Telegram notification sent only once per job, even if exception occurs multiple times

issues_fixed.issue: ISSUE 2: Stale failing competitive intelligence task in queue

steps.result: ✓ Service stopped (Active: inactive (dead) since Fri 2026-04-10 18:00:09 UTC)

steps.action: Remove stale CI tasks from queue

syntax_check.note: No syntax errors after error_notified flag addition

service_status.note: Service stopped and will not auto-restart

changes: Line 699: Added error_notified = False before try block
Lines 800-803: Updated exception handler with conditional Telegram send
code_changes_summary.logic: Flag prevents duplicate Telegram notifications for the same task failure
code_changes_summary.impact: Reduces operational noise in Telegram channel when CI agent encounters errors

next_steps: Consider root fix: deploy report template at /home/agentuser/agents/report_agent/templates/stratledger_template.docx
